summary: TOI Plus paywall not refreshed after successful payment
description:
Users report that after a successful TOI Plus annual purchase (₹1499), the paywall continues to show even after closing and re-opening the app. Bank confirms payment, order receipt is emailed, but entitlement state is not refreshed in the app.

Fix: refresh entitlement immediately on payment-receipt webhook instead of waiting for next foreground event. Shipped in v8.3.2.
